name: Sahana Rajashekara
title: Software Engineer
summary:
Software Engineer with an MS in Computer Science from Northeastern University. 2+ years building scalable full-stack applications and user-facing products in fast-paced, high-impact environments.

I build reliable, production-grade systems - from RESTful APIs and database design to distributed systems and cloud infrastructure. My stack spans Java (Spring Boot), Python (FastAPI, Flask), React/TypeScript, Node.js, SQL/NoSQL, and AWS, with experience in Docker and CI/CD pipelines.

I also focus on building AI-powered applications: end-to-end pipelines, LLM orchestration, multimodal systems, MCP, RAG, and voice interfaces. Certified AI Engineer for Developers.
